content.en:
Somewhere in the death zone.

Ye Tian came here, ready to test the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Two of his replica bodies fought, one holding the Eternal Pillar and the other without.

Immediately.

Ye Tian held the Eternal Demon Pillar in his hand and cast the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, the Spear of the Ruin Sun!

Suddenly, the tip of a spear turned from the Eternal Demon Pillar, and a terrifying power erupted.

However, urging the Eternal Demon Pillar consumed a lot of Eternal Dao power, and even he couldn't use it a few times.

Rumble!!!!

The Eternal Demon Pillar fell, and Ye Tian's other copy body was directly bombarded, and all the means were used, but there was no way to block the blow of the Eternal Demon Pillar.

"It's terrifying, it is estimated that even ordinary Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses will be difficult to stop!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Later, he tried a few more times, mainly to see how to use the Eternal Pillar as a conventional weapon to maximize its effect.

Gradually, he became more adept at using the Eternal Pillar.

......

Imaginary domain.

Ye Tian returned here, and he also brought the Eternal Demon Pillar over.

He is going to study the Eternal Demon Pillar here, and it will not affect the Terrans, after all, none of the Terrans here have the Eternal Dao Seed, so naturally they will not be transformed into the Eternal Demon Seed.

And the area he studied was very remote, and the impact was even smaller.

At this time.

Ye Tian was mainly studying how to use the Eternal Demon Pillar to let his relatives grow the Eternal Dao Seed at the same time, if he let his family refine the Eternal Demon Pillar, their refining speed would be too slow, and the effect would naturally not be fast.

However, if he activated the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar and took the initiative to influence their Eternal Dao Seed, then he might be able to refine their Eternal Dao Seed faster.

That's what he studied.

Subsequently.

He copied several duplicate bodies, all of which were Eternal Dao Body cultivation bodies, to cooperate with the research.

The years passed.

Ye Tian made almost no progress at first, but with the cooperation of the Dao Seed Secret Technique, he made rapid progress.

"It seems that we have to create a Dao Seed Secret Technique, and cooperate with the Eternal Demon Pillar to refine the Eternal Dao Seed, so that we can have better results!" Ye Tian thought.

......

More than 100 million years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tiancai can be regarded as having truly created a Dao Seed Secret Technique that matches the Eternal Demon Pillar, of course, he also needs to urge the Eternal Demon Pillar to release an Eternal Demon Pillar realm, and others can use this Eternal Dao Seed Secret Technique to absorb the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar, so as to quickly refine the Eternal Dao Seed.

This Eternal Dao Secret Technique, he named it the Eternal Pillar Technique, is simple and simple, after all, this secret technique can only do this kind of thing, and has no other use.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian informed his wife and children that they had returned to the Void Domain.

Soon after, they returned.

"Father!"

"Husband!"

The three shouted.

"Take you somewhere!"

Ye Tian hadn't told them about the Eternal Demon Pillar's research, so they still didn't know that Ye Tian had mastered the Eternal Demon Pillar.

When Ye Xingchen saw the Eternal Demon Pillar, he was immediately shocked, "Father, this is the Eternal Demon Pillar????"

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded, "This is the Eternal Demon Pillar!"

Ye Xingchen was shocked: "Father, isn't the Eternal Demon Pillar controlled by the Demon Seed Abyss, even the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods doesn't dare to enter the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, how did you get the Eternal Demon Pillar? And took it away!"

Ye Tian said with a smile: "Because the Demon Seed Linyuan was killed by me a long time ago, when the Demon Seed Linyuan came out of the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, I broke the mark he left in the Eternal Demon Seed." After that, I trapped the demon seed Linyuan, initially refined the Eternal Demon Pillar, and then used the Eternal Demon Pillar to kill it. And all these years, I have been refining the Eternal Demon Pillar in the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, and now I can really control it, so I can take it away. "

"I see!"

Ye Xingchen understood.

Ye Tian continued: "Now, I have researched the Dao Seed Secret Technique that allows the Eternal Demon Pillar to enhance your Eternal Dao Seed, and if you cultivate this Dao Seed Secret Technique, you can absorb the energy of the Eternal Demon Pillar to quickly refine your Eternal Dao Seed!"

Then, Ye Tian passed on the Eternal Pillar Technique to the three of them.

Rumble!!!!!

After they received the Eternal Pillar Technique, they began to practice the Eternal Pillar Technique.

After a while, they practiced the Eternal Pillar Technique.

"Here we go!"

Ye Tian urged the Eternal Demon Pillar, and released a realm with the Eternal Demon Pillar, and the terrifying Eternal Demon Pillar energy burst out.

If a normal Eternal Dao Body powerhouse enters here, it will definitely turn into a demon.

However, no matter how rich the Eternal Demon Pillar energy here was, it couldn't affect Ye Tian and his family, after all, they were all perfect-level Eternal Dao Species.

"Cultivate!"

Ye Xingchen sat cross-legged and ran the Eternal Demon Pillar Technique, and a large amount of Eternal Demon Pillar energy poured into his body to refine his Eternal Dao Seed.

He clearly felt that the refining and improvement effect of the Eternal Dao Seed this time was far superior to the previous one, and even the Eternal Fire Vine was not as good as the effect this time!

"It's worthy of the Eternal Demon Pillar, the effect is too good!"

Ye Xingchen was excited.

Xiao Yue and Ye Xingyue were naturally extremely excited, and they were both rapidly refining their Eternal Dao Seeds.

At this rate, they might also be able to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit after not too many years, so as to impact the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm realm.

100 million years of the Dao Era!

200 million years of the Dao Era!

500 million years to the Dao era!

Unconsciously, Ye Xingchen and their Eternal Dao Seed were about to be raised to the limit of the Eternal Dao Seed.

this day.

His wife Xiao Yue's Eternal Dao Seed was the first to break through to the limit, which is not to say that her cultivation speed is faster than that of her son Ye Xingchen, but (De Zhao) Her foundation is not as good as Ye Xingchen, and the limit of the Eternal Dao Seed is lower, so it is easier to raise to the limit.

After Xiao Yue's Eternal Dao Cultivation broke through to the limit, Ye Tian passed it on to her.

Soon.

Xiao Yue successfully completed a little solidification, broke the shackles, and broke through to a half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm cultivation, and her strength skyrocketed.

Not long after, Ye Xingyue also raised the Eternal Dao Seed to its current limit, and also used the Ruin Sun Solidification Technique to break through to the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

Another period of time passed, and Ye Xingchen finally raised the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit, and then used the Ruin Sun Solidification Technique to complete a breakthrough and become a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse.

At this point, Ye Tian and his three family members were all in the half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm cultivation.

Not long after, there was new information from the Lone Star Realm Alliance, and the Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse from Beilongze had returned from the Realm God Realm Realm.
